RoA_A01_M01_VO_S001_002_ULI.source: Soldiers of Lordaeron, protect the king!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S002_002_ULI.source: Your Majesty, we must abandon the palace and retreat to the courtyard. There, we can make our final stand and fortify our defenses.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S002_003_TME.source: Agreed. But first, we must get my son from his chambers!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S003_001_ULI.source: The door is locked! We'll need to find a way to open it!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S004_001_TME.source: I cannot leave without my son...

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S004_003_TME.source: Arthas, my son, thank the Light you are safe. We're leaving the palace.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S004_004_TME.source: Ah, my treasury. It used to be full of gold…

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S005_001_MBR.source: The might of the mountains shall destroy ye!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S005_002_MBR.source: I’ll crack yer skulls! Savage beasts!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S005_003_MBR.source: Lads! Do not let them advance further!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S006_001_ULI.source: My King, you'll be safe here. I'll reinforce the city's defenses.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S006_002_AME.source: Father, are those creatures going to kill us?

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S006_003_TME.source: Fear not, Arthas. We are safe, for now. But if we are overrun, seek out the catacombs and join Prince Varian in the hideout.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S006_004_TME.source: I'll take care of them, lad. You do your duty.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S007_001_TUR.source: Your Majesty, Lord Lothar dispatched us the moment we heard the city had been besieged, Thank the Light you and your family are safe.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S007_002_TME.source: If you hadn’t reached us in time, I’m afraid all would’ve been lost, young Paladin. Your aid is sorely needed.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S007_003_ULI.source: Just in time, brother. We have much to do.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S007_004_TUR.source: Tell us what to do, Lord Uther.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S007_005_ULI.source: We must reclaim the city's districts and drive out the orcs. I'll handle the western district, and you handle the eastern one.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S008_001_TME.source: Use barracks to replenish your troops!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S008_002_WIL.source: We must dig out the rubble of the residential buildings, some citizens could have survived.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S009_001_TUR.source: We've done it! The orcs are falling back!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S009_002_ULI.source: Don't celebrate just yet... Look, the dragons are attacking the palace!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S010_002_ULI.source: We must support our archers and bring down those dragons!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S011_001_TUR.source: Those winged beasts are too formidable... we can't vanquish them all...

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S011_002_MBR.source: Maybe if those blasted Wildhammers were here to get off their asses!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S011_004_KWI.source: Hah, what was that Bronzebeard? Hear that lads, let's hunt us some flying lizards, shall we?! Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S012_001_ULI.source: You arrived just in time, my dwarven friend. The city would have been reduced to ashes if not for your aid.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S012_002_KWI.source: Anduin Lothar helped us defend our homeland against the orcish scum. Now we’ll return the favor by ridding the city of greenskin mongrels.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S012_003_TUR.source: How far is Lord Lothar from the city?

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S012_004_KWI.source: He's not heading here. His army is marching through Hillsbrad to relieve Dalaran and attack the orcs from the rear. If all goes as planned, the Horde will be caught between our forces here and his forces down south.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S012_005_ULI.source: A solid plan. Now we must ensure we hold our defense here.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S012_006_TUR.source: First, we need to cleanse the last two city districts of those unholy creatures. March on!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S013_001_OPI.source: Chicken soup is back on the menu, boys!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S013_002_KWI.source: Blast it, their armada is too formidable for my gryphon pack. I can't take them all head on; there are too many ships!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S013_003_ULI.source: In that case, we should concentrate our efforts on the lower city.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S013_004_MBR.source: I've had enough rest. It's time to crush some orcish skulls.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S013_005_MBR.source: You can follow if you can keep up.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S014_001_DPO.source: We're in luck boys, the fog concealed our presence, lets break this armada.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S014_002_DPO.source: C'mon sailors, our allies in the city need help, dealing with those orcish ships was easy task, but now we need to work with some sweat and blood.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S015_001_DPO.source: The Lord Admiral sent me with the northern armada as soon as he received reports of the siege. Blessed be the sea; we have arrived in time.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S015_002_ULI.source: Your help is much appreciated. Without the might of Kul Tiras, this naval blockade could have held on for who knows how long.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S015_003_TUR.source: To achieve final victory over their remaining forces, we must cross the lake, assault Fenris Isle, and capture their generals.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S015_004_MBR.source: Ah, with all due respect to Master Proudmoore and his sea warriors, dwarves can never feel comfortable on any kind of boat. But then again, it's better than to ride a gryphon.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S015_005_ULI.source: Your wounds need more time to heal, my friend. You've already done a lot to ensure our victory here.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S015_006_MBR.source: But… ah, I'll miss all the fun…

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S015_007_KWI.source: The lad's right, Master Bronzebeard. You already put up good fight, I have to admit. But now, ya need to rest.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S015_008_DPO.source: My ships are at your disposal...

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S016_001_USC.source: Warchief, the humans have retaken the city! What do we do?

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S016_002_THA.source: We must press the attack! Those dogs deserve no reprieve!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S016_003_ODO.source: No. Between Dalaran and Alterac, our forces are stretched too thin. And the Alliance has further reinforcements on the way. We need to sound a tactical retreat, fall back, and regroup.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S016_005_ODO.source: Enough! That’s a command! Tharbek, you will oversee that our retreat is orderly. Utok, you will travel to our base at Zul’Dare and make sure our western supply lines remain intact. Is that clear?

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S016_007_THA.source: Yes, Warchief. But what of our base here?

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S016_008_ODO.source: We can’t hope to hold it. Not without committing troops we can’t spare right now. But we can leave the humans a surprise…

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S017_002.source: Puny humans, too stupid. Warchief said you die, so you die.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S018_001_GIR.source: You run now? Not with no feet!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S018_002_GIR.source: Hard to breathe, eh? Soon you will stop breathing!

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S018_003_GIR.source: Ha-ha! Today I ate a gnome for a breakfast.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S018_004_ULI.source: The island is ours once again.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S019_001_TME.source: Today's victory came at a heavy price… Many brave souls have died so that we might live. We should take care of their bodies and their families… Yet Doomhammer has escaped, so we can't delay.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S019_002_ULI.source: Yes, my liege. Grief fills my heart as well, but we must act and follow him south immediately.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S019_003_DPO.source: My remaining ships are at your disposal, Your Majesty.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S019_004_KWI.source: My gryphons need a few hours to rest, but afterward, we can support your offensive from the sky.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S019_005_TME.source: Turalyon, gather all Knights of the Silver Hand and all soldiers able to fight. They will have time to rest on the ships while crossing the lake.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S019_007_TME.source: Uther, I want you to stay here and take care of the wounded. Your skills and compassion can save more lives here than on the front line.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S019_008_ULI.source: There is wisdom in your words… I will obey, my king.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S019_009_TME.source: Muradin, I want you to stay with me. You've shed enough blood for Lordaeron already, and I don't want to face the wrath of your brother-king if something were to happen to you.

RoA_A01_M01_VO_S019_010_MBR.source: Your words warm my heart, King Terenas.

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_002.source: The orcish horde has breached the palace walls, and the throne room lies under siege. King Terenas must not fall. Rally your forces, hold the line, and drive back the invaders before they reach His Majesty.

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_007.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Shield the King
 - Terenas must survive
 - Uther must survive

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_009.source: Orcs are inside the palace, placing Crown Prince Arthas in grave danger. Locate the Prince and lead him to safety, the royal line must be protected!

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_011.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
King's Heir
- Find prince Arthas 
- Terenas must survive
- Uther must survive

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_012.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r
King's Heir
- |cffff0000Uther must survive (failed)|r

|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r

- Terenas must survive
- Uther must survive
- Arthas must survive
- Leave the palace

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_020.source: The time has come to drive these vermin out of our city. Purge the orc infestation district by district! Stand united and reclaim the capital!

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_026.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Retake the city
- Retake West wing
- All Heroes must survive

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_038.source: Rescue civilians from the rubble piles

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_039.source: Some civilians are buried under the rubble, help them to get out of their traps.

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_040.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST|r
Survivors
- Dig out citizens out of rubble piles (0 / 12 piles)

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_044.source: Dragons are attacking the palace! threatening its defenses. Recruit archers to bring them down, and support your troops with the healing power of your paladins.

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_045.source: Don’t let the dragons destroy the palace

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_046.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST|r
Dark Wings
 - Don’t let dragons destroy the palace

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_048.source:

Dark Wings

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_051.source: Fenris Isle is the last Horde stronghold on Lordamere Lake. Crush their forces there and lift the siege. Show no mercy and put them all to the sword!

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_054.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Liberation of Fenris Isle
 - Destroy Enemy Camp
 - All Heroes must survive

 - Defeat the Horde General

RoA_A01_M01_OBJE_060.source: At least one Hero must survive

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_001.source:
|cff87ceebREINFORCEMENT|r
Royal Guard - elite soldiers of Lordaeron, trained to fight with halberds, giving them greater attack range than footmen. They also carry shields for defense.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_002.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r
Terenas can help you carry items. But be warned, he can use some of them to heal himself.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_003.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r
Find a key or pull a lever to open locked doors.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_004.source:
|cff8080ffNEW HEROES|r
Turalyon - One of the first Priests of Lordaeron trained as a Paladin by Uther the Lightbringer. He is a staunch believer in maintaining order through strict martial discipline.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_005.source:
|cff8080ffNEW SEMI HERO|r
Wilhelm - One of the seasoned veterans of Azeroth, who served as Captain under Anduin Lothar.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_006.source:
|cff87ceebREINFORCEMENT|r
Defender of Faith - Soldiers of the Silver Hand Order armed with long spears. They can defend against enemy magic, though at the cost of reduced movement speed.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_007.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE UNLOCKED|r
Lordaeron Footmen - arrayed in hardened steel armor, they courageously wield broadsword and shield in hand-to-hand combat against their vile orcish foes.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_008.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r
Magical Orbs can allow heroes attack flying units.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_009.source:
|cff87ceebREINFORCEMENT|r
Defenders - Lordaeron citizens who answered the call of duty to protect both cities and towns, equipped with armor and longswords. They move and strike faster than regular footmen.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_010.source:
|cff8080ffNEW HEROES|r
Kurdran, the Thane of the Wildhammer Clan, mounted on his loyal gryphon Sky'ree, is one of the most renowned allies of the human race.
When Sky’ree is |cffffcc00airborne|r - they |cff32cd32can engage air units|r, but |cffff0000cannot attack ground targets|r.
When Sky’ree is |cffffcc00on the ground|r - they |cff32cd32can attack ground units|r but |cffff0000cannot engage flying ones|r.
Kurdran can use his hero abilities on any units regardless of stance.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_011.source:
|cff87ceebREINFORCEMENT|r
Gryphon Riders - mighty war beasts of the Wildhammer Clan. The gryphon and its dwarf rider dominate the skies, crushing all enemies of the Alliance.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_012.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r
Muradin will follow Kurdran and engage in fights with enemies, but you cannot control him.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_013.source:
|cff8080ffNEW HEROES|r
Derek Proudmoore - commander of the Third Fleet of Kul Tiras and the eldest son of Grand Admiral Daelin Proudmoore. An agile warrior, he moves swiftly and can throw grenades at enemies.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_014.source:
|cff87ceebREINFORCEMENT|r
Kul'Tiran Ships - Admiral Proudmoore has dispatched his Third Fleet to break the siege of Lordaeron. Use these ships to reach Fenris Isle and destroy the remaining orcish navy.

RoA_A01_M01_MESS_015.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE UNLOCKED|r
Lordaeron Archer - a skilled marksman of the Lordaeron army. Though not as elegant as elven archers, still lethal against Horde infantry.
